allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\({ path: ''.env.local'' }\); var k = process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY || ''''; console.log\(''starts:'', k.substring\(0,15\)\); console.log\(''len:'', k.length\); console.log\(''trimmed:'', k === k.trim\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\({ path: ''.env.local'' }\); var k = process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY || ''''; console.log\(''starts:'', k.substring\(0,15\)\); console.log\(''ends:'', k.substring\(k.length-5\)\); console.log\(''len:'', k.length\);")

Bash(node -e "var fs = require\(''fs''\); var content = fs.readFileSync\(''.env.local'', ''utf-8''\); var lines = content.split\(''\\n''\).filter\(l => l.includes\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY''\)\); lines.forEach\(l => { var val = l.split\(''=''\)[1] || ''''; console.log\(''starts:'', val.substring\(0,15\), ''ends:'', val.substring\(val.length-5\), ''len:'', val.length\); }\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{k}: type={v.get\(schema,{}\).get\(type,?\)}, props={list\(v.get\(schema,{}\).get\(properties,{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]}''''\) for k,v in d.get\(''''slots'''',{}\).items\(\)]")
